case_title: JONATHAN FRENCH VS. ANDERS L. JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-23-2009 BY JEFFREY S. ROSS. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. CANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRENCH, JONATHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ANDERS L. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. THERE WAS NO CONTRACT NOR AGREEMENT BETWEEN MR. JOHNSON AND DR. FRENCH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY FRENCH, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ANDERS L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-23-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-20-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ANDERS L.
